query: SELECT businessDate, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN `readyMadeGelatoShiftType`='opening' THEN (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(smallGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - smallPanCount * 0.286, 0), smallPanCount * (3.5 - 0.286)) * 112 / (3.5 - 0.286)) + (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(largeGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - largePanCount * 0.4, 0), largePanCount * (4.5 - 0.4)) * 160 / (4.5 - 0.4)) ELSE 0 END), 1) AS openingVolumeOunces, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN `readyMadeGelatoShiftType`='closing' THEN (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(smallGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - smallPanCount * 0.286, 0), smallPanCount * (3.5 - 0.286)) * 112 / (3.5 - 0.286)) + (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(largeGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - largePanCount * 0.4, 0), largePanCount * (4.5 - 0.4)) * 160 / (4.5 - 0.4)) ELSE 0 END), 1) AS closingVolumeOunces, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN `readyMadeGelatoShiftType`='opening' THEN (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(smallGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - smallPanCount * 0.286, 0), smallPanCount * (3.5 - 0.286)) * 112 / (3.5 - 0.286)) + (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(largeGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - largePanCount * 0.4, 0), largePanCount * (4.5 - 0.4)) * 160 / (4.5 - 0.4)) ELSE -( (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(smallGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - smallPanCount * 0.286, 0), smallPanCount * (3.5 - 0.286)) * 112 / (3.5 - 0.286)) + (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(largeGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - largePanCount * 0.4, 0), largePanCount * (4.5 - 0.4)) * 160 / (4.5 - 0.4)) ) END), 1) AS distributedVolumeOunces FROM readyMadeGelatoWeights WHERE businessDate='2026-05-14' GROUP BY businessDate;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2AT7PKThMZE7xfR.348748892d99 --database m6piugSRrMfjwvid4xHM78 --execute SELECT businessDate, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN `readyMadeGelatoShiftType`='opening' THEN (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(smallGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - smallPanCount * 0.286, 0), smallPanCount * (3.5 - 0.286)) * 112 / (3.5 - 0.286)) + (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(largeGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - largePanCount * 0.4, 0), largePanCount * (4.5 - 0.4)) * 160 / (4.5 - 0.4)) ELSE 0 END), 1) AS openingVolumeOunces, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN `readyMadeGelatoShiftType`='closing' THEN (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(smallGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - smallPanCount * 0.286, 0), smallPanCount * (3.5 - 0.286)) * 112 / (3.5 - 0.286)) + (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(largeGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - largePanCount * 0.4, 0), largePanCount * (4.5 - 0.4)) * 160 / (4.5 - 0.4)) ELSE 0 END), 1) AS closingVolumeOunces, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN `readyMadeGelatoShiftType`='opening' THEN (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(smallGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - smallPanCount * 0.286, 0), smallPanCount * (3.5 - 0.286)) * 112 / (3.5 - 0.286)) + (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(largeGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - largePanCount * 0.4, 0), largePanCount * (4.5 - 0.4)) * 160 / (4.5 - 0.4)) ELSE -( (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(smallGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - smallPanCount * 0.286, 0), smallPanCount * (3.5 - 0.286)) * 112 / (3.5 - 0.286)) + (LEAST(GREATEST(CAST(largeGrossWeightKg AS DECIMAL(10,4)) - largePanCount * 0.4, 0), largePanCount * (4.5 - 0.4)) * 160 / (4.5 - 0.4)) ) END), 1) AS distributedVolumeOunces FROM readyMadeGelatoWeights WHERE businessDate='2026-05-14' GROUP BY businessDate;
